title: Unique Party 1915C - Striped Birthday Candles in Holders, Assorted Pack of 20
features: Pack of 20 Striped Birthday Candles in Holders
Striped Candles each measure approximately 6cm (2.5") in height and come in 3 assorted colours
Ideal for decorating cakes, cupcakes and other baked goods at any birthday party
Striped candles can be used alone, or mixed with other coloured candles, number candles or cake bunting for extra festive flair
Coordinate with other birthday party supplies and party decorations from Unique Party
description: Product Description Brighten up your birthday celebration with these delightful Assorted Striped Birthday Candles in Holders. Featuring classic spiral stripes, this assorted pack of yellow, pink, and blue candles comes complete with red plastic holders that make them easy to stand and position on any celebration cake. Use them to put a festive finishing touch to any homemade or store-bought treat, whether it's a traditional birthday cake or a batch of cupcakes. These striped candles look great alone, but can also be easily paired with other coloured candles, number candles, cake banners or bunting to add that extra touch of decorative flair. Note: “ This product is delivered by the manufacturer in an assortment of colors and / or random models. For this reason Amazon.uk cannot guarantee the shipment of a particular color and / or model. By ordering this item you will receive one of the colors / patterns shown in the image, depending on the available stock. Amazon.uk thanks you for your understanding" Box Contains 1 x 20 BDAY CANDLES IN HOLDERS
